$Comment: Build-for-both demo: classic 3-point Domination is PURE DATA - same engine, three objective anchors. Tag is 'domination3' so it is opt-in (a preset with ArenaTag 'domination3', or rename this tag to 'domination' to put it in the default rotation). A dedicated worldgen instance can be authored later; this reuses KweebecNightmare_Domination.
Name: Domination_ThreePoint
